_comment: The two skill vocabularies. Non-combat skills used to carry an 'influences' block mapping each onto combat stats (mineralogy -> strength 0.6, dexterity 0.4, and so on). Nothing ever read it, and it encoded the opposite of the settled design: non-combat progression feeds UTILITY, never combat output. Cross-domain conversions now live in cross_domain.json, where they are validated at load and actually applied.
